title: VLCC Fleet Technical Management
summary: Complete technical management takeover of 6 VLCCs, optimizing operational efficiency and reducing downtime by 15%.
content: We assumed full technical management for a fleet of 6 Very Large Crude Carriers. By implementing our predictive maintenance program and streamlining dry-docking procedures, we increased the fleet's operational availability days by 15% in the first year. Our rigorous safety standards also ensured zero non-conformities during major oil major inspections.

title: Global Crewing Strategy for Gas Carriers
summary: Deployed specialized LPG/LNG trained crew across 12 vessels, achieving 95% retention rate and ensuring compliance.
content: Sourcing qualified crew for gas carriers is a global challenge. We implemented a dedicated recruitment and training pipeline, ensuring all seafarers met SIGTTO standards. Our focus on crew welfare and career progression resulted in a 95% retention rate, providing stability and safety for the client's high-value assets.

title: Commercial Operations Optimization
summary: Revamped post-fixture operations for a dry bulk fleet, reducing demurrage claims and improving voyage yields.
content: Our client was facing revenue leakage due to inefficient post-fixture operations. We integrated a centralized commercial management platform and dedicated operations team to monitor voyage execution 24/7. This proactive approach minimized demurrage claims and optimized bunker consumption, directly improving the TCE (Time Charter Equivalent) yields.
